decorations.description: A circular geometric diagram consisting of one large outer circle with four medium circles positioned at the cardinal points (top, bottom, left, right) along its circumference, four smaller circles arranged diagonally around the center, and a small central circle, all connected by straight lines forming a cross pattern, with each circle containing a number
